stemHtml: Regarding the No Transgression Zone (NTZ) for independent parallel approaches, which is correct?

options.a: Pilots cannot penetrate; NTZ is larger than the combined missed approach areas.
options.b: ATC ensures no aircraft penetrates the NTZ.
options.c: ATC permits brief penetration but not crossing.
options.d: Pilots cannot penetrate; NTZ is smaller than the combined areas.
